signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in Feb), undershooting market forecasts of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps despite oil surge | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Released April 2, 2026, by Statistics Korea, this data shows monthly CPI up 0.3% (below 0.6% expected), with transportation +5% YoY from oil but food down to 0.5% and core at 2.2% (from 2.3%)
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
